The '''Unified Factions''' was the [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] government of the [[Kroctari]] species, lead by the [[Lord Superior]]. Although they initially resisted inclusion to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], after joining the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the Unified Factions witnessed its disarray, and welcomed the chance to join the [[Imperial Remnant]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[Vision of the Future (abridged audiobook)|''Vision of the Future'' abridged audiobook]]
